question_answers.answer: I am interested in {company} because this {title} role lines up with my experience building production software across backend, frontend, infrastructure, and cloud systems. I am excited by teams that ship reliable products for real users, and I can contribute quickly with my experience in Python, TypeScript, React, AWS, Firebase, Terraform, and full-stack product delivery.

I am especially interested in roles where I can combine strong product ownership with hands-on engineering across backend services, frontend experiences, and cloud infrastructure. I have shipped production applications at Advanced Cad Cam Service and John Deere, including Next.js internal tools, Terraform/AWS deployment automation, Firebase serverless workflows, and cross-platform mobile products.
I am currently authorized to work in the United States under F-1 OPT.
Yes, I will require future sponsorship.
